requirement_topic.en: EMC — Electromagnetic Compatibility Standards via MSTRD (MS/CISPR / MS/IEC)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — MSTRD管理的电磁兼容标准（MS/CISPR / MS/IEC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — MSTRD管理的電磁相容標準（MS/CISPR / MS/IEC）

summary.en: Myanmar does not have a mandatory horizontal EMC regulation equivalent to the EU EMC Directive or a comprehensive compulsory EMC certification scheme for imported wireless consumer electronics as of 2026. MSTRD adopts CISPR and IEC standards as Myanmar Standards (MS) including MS/CISPR 32 (Multimedia equipment electromagnetic disturbance limits) and MS/CISPR 35 (Immunity for multimedia equipment). These standards exist in the Myanmar standards catalogue but are designated as voluntary (VS) unless specifically mandated by sector regulation. In practice, Myanmar customs and telecommunications authorities may request evidence of EMC compliance (such as a supplier declaration or foreign test report) for higher-power devices or those operating in sensitive frequency bands, but there is no published mandatory pre-market EMC certification process for general wireless consumer devices. Exporters are advised to retain CISPR 32 / GB 9254 test data to support any documentary request.
summary.zh: 截至2026年，缅甸尚无等同于欧盟EMC指令的强制性横向电磁兼容法规，也无针对进口无线消费电子产品的全面强制EMC认证制度。MSTRD将CISPR和IEC标准采纳为缅甸标准（MS），包括MS/CISPR 32（多媒体设备电磁骚扰限值）和MS/CISPR 35（多媒体设备抗扰度）。上述标准已纳入缅甸标准目录，但除特定行业法规另有规定外，均为自愿性（VS）。实践中，缅甸海关及电信主管机构可能对大功率设备或在敏感频段工作的设备要求提供EMC合规证明（如供应商声明或境外检测报告），但对一般无线消费设备尚无公开的强制性上市前EMC认证程序。建议出口商保留CISPR 32 / GB 9254检测数据，以备文件查验需要。
summary.zht: 截至2026年，緬甸尚無等同於歐盟EMC指令的強制性橫向電磁相容法規，也無針對進口無線消費電子產品的全面強制EMC認證制度。MSTRD將CISPR和IEC標準採納為緬甸標準（MS），包括MS/CISPR 32（多媒體設備電磁騷擾限值）和MS/CISPR 35（多媒體設備抗擾度）。上述標準已納入緬甸標準目錄，但除特定行業法規另有規定外，均為自願性（VS）。實踐中，緬甸海關及電信主管機構可能對大功率設備或在敏感頻段工作的設備要求提供EMC合規證明（如供應商聲明或境外檢測報告），但對一般無線消費設備尚無公開的強制性上市前EMC認證程序。建議出口商保留CISPR 32 / GB 9254檢測數據，以備文件查驗需要。

standards_or_laws: MS/CISPR 32 — Myanmar Standard adoption of CISPR 32: Multimedia equipment — electromagnetic disturbance — requirements (voluntary unless mandated by sector regulation)
MS/CISPR 35 — Myanmar Standard adoption of CISPR 35: Multimedia equipment — immunity requirements (voluntary)
Myanmar Standards Law 2015 — statutory basis for MSTRD standards adoption

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and multimedia equipment is mandatory under the CCC scheme, primarily governed by GB 9254.1-2021 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement, Class A) and GB/T 9254.2-2021 (Class B limits). For wireless devices, additional EMC requirements are embedded in SRRC type-approval testing. The CCC EMC test must be conducted at a CNCA-designated laboratory. China adopted GB 9254 based on CISPR 22 (now superseded by CISPR 32), so Chinese GB 9254 reports and Myanmar MS/CISPR 32 targets substantially overlap in technical content even though they are different regulatory instruments.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及多媒体设备的EMC合规为CCC强制认证内容，主要依据GB 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性限值和测量方法，A类）和GB/T 9254.2-2021（B类限值）。对于无线设备，SRRC型号核准检测中还包含额外的EMC要求。CCC的EMC检测须在CNCA指定实验室进行。中国GB 9254基于CISPR 22（现已被CISPR 32取代）制定，因此中国GB 9254报告与缅甸MS/CISPR 32目标在技术内容上有大量重叠，尽管属于不同的监管文件。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術及多媒體設備的EMC合規為CCC強制認證內容，主要依據GB 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性限值和測量方法，A類）和GB/T 9254.2-2021（B類限值）。對於無線設備，SRRC型號核准檢測中還包含額外的EMC要求。CCC的EMC檢測須在CNCA指定實驗室進行。中國GB 9254基於CISPR 22（現已被CISPR 32取代）制定，因此中國GB 9254報告與緬甸MS/CISPR 32目標在技術內容上有大量重疊，儘管屬於不同的監管文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment radio disturbance characteristics (Class A limits); mandatory under CCC
GB/T 9254.2-2021 — Information technology equipment radio disturbance characteristics (Class B limits)
SRRC Type Approval — includes EMC-related RF emission testing for wireless transmitters (NRA)

gap.en: The practical EMC gap for China-to-Myanmar wireless device exports is low as of 2026: Myanmar lacks a mandatory pre-market EMC certification requirement for consumer wireless electronics. However, exporters should retain existing GB 9254 / CISPR 32 test reports as documentary backup, since customs or MPT may request evidence of non-interference on a case-by-case basis. The technical content of GB 9254 (based on CISPR 22/32) overlaps substantially with Myanmar MS/CISPR 32, reducing re-testing burden if documentation is ever requested. The main risk is regulatory change — Myanmar may introduce mandatory EMC certification as its telecom regulatory framework matures.
gap.zh: 截至2026年，中国无线设备出口缅甸的实际EMC差距较小：缅甸对消费类无线电子产品尚无强制性上市前EMC认证要求。但出口商应保留现有GB 9254 / CISPR 32检测报告作为备用文件，因海关或MPT可能逐案要求提供不干扰证明。GB 9254（基于CISPR 22/32）的技术内容与缅甸MS/CISPR 32有大量重叠，如需提供文件时可减少重新检测的负担。主要风险在于法规变化——随着缅甸电信监管框架的完善，可能引入强制性EMC认证。
gap.zht: 截至2026年，中國無線設備出口緬甸的實際EMC差距較小：緬甸對消費類無線電子產品尚無強制性上市前EMC認證要求。但出口商應保留現有GB 9254 / CISPR 32檢測報告作為備用文件，因海關或MPT可能逐案要求提供不干擾證明。GB 9254（基於CISPR 22/32）的技術內容與緬甸MS/CISPR 32有大量重疊，如需提供文件時可減少重新檢測的負擔。主要風險在於法規變化——隨著緬甸電信監管框架的完善，可能引入強制性EMC認證。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — MS/CISPR 32 and MS/CISPR 35 are reference standards; no mandatory pre-market EMC certification for general wireless consumer devices as of 2026
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9254 EMC compliance required under CCC scheme for IT/AV equipment; EMC testing also embedded in SRRC wireless type-approval

source.publisher: MSTRD — Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division, Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no mandatory horizontal EMC certification for imported wireless consumer devices as of 2026. The practical compliance burden is low. Retain GB 9254 / CISPR 32 test reports as documentary backup for customs queries. Monitor for regulatory changes as Myanmar's telecom framework evolves. Verified: false.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年，缅甸对进口无线消费设备尚无强制性横向EMC认证要求，实际合规负担较低。请保留GB 9254 / CISPR 32检测报告以备海关查询。随着缅甸电信框架的演变，请关注法规变化。已核实：否。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年，緬甸對進口無線消費設備尚無強制性橫向EMC認證要求，實際合規負擔較低。請保留GB 9254 / CISPR 32檢測報告以備海關查詢。隨著緬甸電信框架的演變，請關注法規變化。已核實：否。
